# פאפא-פס — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Papa-Pas is a social football experience for men 35+ in Kiryat Ata, offering a relaxed, fun atmosphere where participants can exercise lightly, make new friends, and end each session with cold beer and laughter. The vibe is casual, friendly, and pressure-free - focusing on movement, social connection, and enjoyment rather than competition. It's designed for beginners who want to stay active while having a good time in a welcoming community setting.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://papa-pas.zappy5.app
חוג כדורגל למבוגרים קריות עם אווירה נינוחה וכיפית! פעילות גופנית קלילה, חברויות חדשות ובירה קרה. הצטרפו לקהילה החברתית של פאפא-פס בקריית אתא

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About פאפא-פס
Papa-Pas is a social football experience for men 35+ in Kiryat Ata, offering a relaxed, fun atmosphere where participants can exercise lightly, make new friends, and end each session with cold beer and laughter. The vibe is casual, friendly, and pressure-free - focusing on movement, social connection, and enjoyment rather than competition. It's designed for beginners who want to stay active while having a good time in a welcoming community setting.

## Target Audience
גברים בני 35 ומעלה בקרית אתא

## Industry
ספורט ופנאי

---
